name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.6.6 GitHub publish guidance and privacy reminders
added: Guided GitHub publish workflow for creating an empty private repository, configuring origin, and optionally pushing the current branch
GitHub remote URL generation for HTTPS and SSH
Privacy checklist reminding users to prefer private repositories for proprietary/client code and review GitHub Copilot AI/data-training settings where available
Default GitHub repository description and copy-to-clipboard support
Conflict-marker scan before Stage resolved file to reduce accidental marker commits
next_recommended: Add GitHub CLI detection and optional gh repo create integration
Add remote health/status panel with authentication hints
Add pre-continue verification across all resolved candidate files
highlights: Local-first GitHub publication guidance with private-repository reminder
Developer-controlled push workflow using command previews and explicit confirmation
Privacy reminder for GitHub Copilot AI/data-training settings
